Localization.Description: An attempt to hide a user account on the welcome screen

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} attempted to change the AccountsService configuration (file "{object.fullpath}") for user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} executed a command to hide all accounts on the welcome screen on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} attempted to change the AccountsService configuration for user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} hid account {object.account.name} on the welcome screen on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} attempted to change configuration file "{object.fullpath}" on host {event_src.host} containing options to hide a username on the welcome screen
